mapper.sql: select id, user_id, coin_type, change_balance, before_balance, after_balance, serial_code, source_code, source_type, remark, create_time, update_time, active_flag from t_user_money_log
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(change_balance), 0) AS yesterday_income FROM t_user_money_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} -- 这里替换为具体的用户ID AND coin_type = 3 AND source_type IN (8, 11, 12) AND DATE(create_time) = DATE(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) AND active_flag = 1;

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(change_balance), 0) AS current_month_income FROM t_user_money_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND coin_type = 3 AND source_type IN (8, 11, 12) AND create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') AND create_time <= NOW() AND active_flag = 1;
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(change_balance), 0) AS totalAmount FROM t_user_money_log WHERE coin_type = 2 AND source_type = 8
